description: Termdock Mono glyph patches. Keep this list intentionally small: only patch characters that are known to appear in prompts/UI and whose platform fallback is visually broken. Do not bulk-alias whole Unicode blocks.

2756.name: BLACK DIAMOND MINUS WHITE X
2756.reason: Used by prompts; Android fallback renders much larger than ◆/◇. Build a distinct four-diamond glyph instead of aliasing to ◆.
